mapper.insert: INSERT INTO page_role_group_management (url_pattern, role_group_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{params.pageRoleGroup.urlPattern}, #{params.pageRoleGroup.roleGroup.id}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE page_role_group_management
url_pattern = #{params.pageRoleGroup.urlPattern},
role_group_id = #{params.pageRoleGroup.roleGroup.id},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{params.pageRoleGroup.id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.url_pattern, p.role_group_id, r.group_name AS role_group_name, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM page_role_group_management p LEFT JOIN role_group_management r ON p.role_group_id = r.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.url_pattern, p.role_group_id, r.group_name AS role_group_name, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM page_role_group_management p LEFT JOIN role_group_management r ON p.role_group_id = r.id WHERE p.id = #{params.id}

SELECT p.id, p.url_pattern, p.role_group_id, r.group_name AS role_group_name, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM page_role_group_management p LEFT JOIN role_group_management r ON p.role_group_id = r.id WHERE p.url_pattern = #{params.urlPattern}

SELECT p.id, p.url_pattern, p.role_group_id, r.group_name AS role_group_name, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM page_role_group_management p LEFT JOIN role_group_management r ON p.role_group_id = r.id WHERE p.role_group_id = #{params.roleGroupId}
